---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an enhancement to EfficientAssetRipper
title: "[feat] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem

What's the use case or pain point that prompted this request?
(e.g. "I rip a lot of materials with non-standard suffixes and have to manually
re-wire them every time")

## Proposed solution

What you'd like to see happen. Be specific — UI placement, behaviour, edge
cases.

## Alternatives considered

Anything else you've thought about, including current workarounds.

## Game / asset context (if relevant)

If this is about a particular game or asset shape, mention which one and
what's unusual about it.

## Additional context

Screenshots, mockups, links to similar features in other tools, etc.
